## Category

- [ ] `dev` — Programming languages, frameworks, libraries
- [ ] `devops` — CI/CD, containers, cloud, infrastructure
- [ ] `gaming` — Game engines, modding, tools

## Checklist

### Content Quality
- [ ] I used the standard cheatsheet template format
- [ ] All commands have been personally tested or verified against official docs
- [ ] Every description is **8 words or fewer**
- [ ] No opinions, brand preferences, or subjective recommendations
- [ ] The Quick Reference table is included and accurate
- [ ] All code blocks use the ` ```bash ` language tag (or appropriate language)
- [ ] Tips & Tricks section is included at the bottom

### Formatting
- [ ] File is placed in the correct category folder (`dev/`, `devops/`, `gaming/`, `hardware/`)
- [ ] File name is lowercase with hyphens (e.g., `my-tool.md`)
- [ ] H1 title matches the file name (e.g., `# My Tool Cheatsheet`)
- [ ] Contributor note is included at the end of the file

### If this is a Translation
- [ ] Translated file mirrors the English original's structure exactly
- [ ] Commands and flags are **not** translated
- [ ] A language header note is added at the top of the translated file
- [ ] Translator's GitHub handle is credited
